scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @dcredit/backend-shared build && pnpm --filter @dcredit/app-api build && pnpm --filter @dcredit/admin-api build && pnpm --filter @dcredit/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./packages/**" --filter "./apps/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @dcredit/backend-shared build && pnpm --filter @dcredit/app-api build && pnpm --filter @dcredit/admin-api build && pnpm --filter @dcredit/web build && pnpm --filter @dcredit/mobile typecheck
